name: zig-cinterop

Activates on queries about zig build-exe, zig build-lib, optimize modes, ReleaseSafe, ReleaseFast, ReleaseSmall, zig cc, zig ast-check, or Zig compilation errors.

name: zig-comptime

name: zig-cross

Activates on queries about debugging Zig, Zig panics, zig gdb, zig lldb, std.debug.print, Zig stack traces, or Zig error return traces.

name: zig-testing

Activates on queries about Zig tests, zig test, zig build test, comptime testing, test allocators, Zig fuzz testing, or detecting memory leaks in Zig tests.

name: multiversx-clarification-expert
description: Identify ambiguous requirements and ask targeted clarifying questions for MultiversX development. Use when user requests are vague, missing technical constraints, or have conflicting requirements.

Covers differential review (version comparison, upgrade safety), fix verification (validate patches, regression testing), and variant analysis (find similar bugs across codebase). Use when reviewing PRs, verifying security patches, or hunting for bug variants.

name: multiversx-constant-time

name: multiversx-cross-contract-calls

name: multiversx-cross-contract-storage
description: Read another contract's storage directly without async calls using storage_mapper_from_address. Use when building aggregators, controllers, or any contract that needs to read state from other same-shard contracts without proxy call overhead.

description: Cryptographic operations in MultiversX smart contracts. Use when hashing data (SHA256, Keccak256, RIPEMD160), verifying signatures (Ed25519, secp256k1, secp256r1, BLS), or encoding signatures in on-chain logic.

name: multiversx-defi-math

name: multiversx-factory-manager

name: multiversx-flash-loan-patterns

name: multiversx-project-architecture
description: Production-grade project structure patterns for MultiversX smart contracts. Use when starting a new contract project, refactoring an existing one, or building multi-contract systems with shared code.

name: multiversx-project-culture

name: multiversx-property-testing

name: multiversx-protocol-experts

name: multiversx-security-audit
description: Complete security audit methodology for MultiversX smart contracts. Covers context building, entry point analysis, static analysis patterns, and automated Semgrep scanning. Use when performing security audits, code reviews, or setting up automated vulnerability detection.

name: multiversx-sharp-edges

name: multiversx-vault-pattern
